'''shosafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadchromatic|quadchromatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-s-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadchromatic|quadchromatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| shosafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosafithi|shosafithi]] || [[word:shosafiji|shosafiji]] || [[word:shosafishi|shosafishi]] || [[word:shosafiki|shosafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosafuthuthu|shosafuthuthu]] || [[word:shosafujuju|shosafujuju]] || [[word:shosafushushu|shosafushushu]] || [[word:shosafukuku|shosafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosafuthu|shosafuthu]] || [[word:shosafuju|shosafuju]] || [[word:shosafushu|shosafushu]] || [[word:shosafuku|shosafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosafufthuf|shosafufthuf]] || [[word:shosafufjuf|shosafufjuf]] || [[word:shosafufshuf|shosafufshuf]] || [[word:shosafufkuf|shosafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosafethe|shosafethe]] || [[word:shosafeje|shosafeje]] || [[word:shosafeshe|shosafeshe]] || [[word:shosafeke|shosafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosafothotho|shosafothotho]] || [[word:shosafojojo|shosafojojo]] || [[word:shosafoshosho|shosafoshosho]] || [[word:shosafokoko|shosafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosafotho|shosafotho]] || [[word:shosafojo|shosafojo]] || [[word:shosafosho|shosafosho]] || [[word:shosafoko|shosafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosafofthof|shosafofthof]] || [[word:shosafofjof|shosafofjof]] || [[word:shosafofshof|shosafofshof]] || [[word:shosafofkof|shosafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosafïfthïf|shosafïfthïf]] || [[word:shosafïfjïf|shosafïfjïf]] || [[word:shosafïfshïf|shosafïfshïf]] || [[word:shosafïfkïf|shosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosafïfthïfthïf|shosafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:shosafïfjïfjïf|shosafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:shosafïfshïfshïf|shosafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:shosafïfkïfkïf|shosafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosafïfthïf|shosafïfthïf]] || [[word:shosafïfjïf|shosafïfjïf]] || [[word:shosafïfshïf|shosafïfshïf]] || [[word:shosafïfkïf|shosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosafïfthïf|shosafïfthïf]] || [[word:shosafïfjïf|shosafïfjïf]] || [[word:shosafïfshïf|shosafïfshïf]] || [[word:shosafïfkïf|shosafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shosafæthæ|shosafæthæ]] || [[word:shosafæjæ|shosafæjæ]] || [[word:shosafæshæ|shosafæshæ]] || [[word:shosafækæ|shosafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shosafathatha|shosafathatha]] || [[word:shosafajaja|shosafajaja]] || [[word:shosafashasha|shosafashasha]] || [[word:shosafakaka|shosafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shosafatha|shosafatha]] || [[word:shosafaja|shosafaja]] || [[word:shosafasha|shosafasha]] || [[word:shosafaka|shosafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shosafafthaf|shosafafthaf]] || [[word:shosafafjaf|shosafafjaf]] || [[word:shosafafshaf|shosafafshaf]] || [[word:shosafafkaf|shosafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:shosafasha|shosafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosafshësha|shosafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosafrosha|shosafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosafmusha|shosafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosafyasha|shosafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosafnkshësha|goshosafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosafnkrosha|goshosafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosafnkmusha|goshosafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosafnkyasha|goshosafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:shosasafasha|shosasafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosasafshësha|shosasafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosasafrosha|shosasafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosasafmusha|shosasafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosasafyasha|shosasafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosasafnkshësha|goshosasafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosasafnkrosha|goshosasafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosasafnkmusha|goshosasafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosasafnkyasha|goshosasafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shesæfasha|shesæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shesæfshësha|shesæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shesæfrosha|shesæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shesæfmusha|shesæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shesæfyasha|shesæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshesæfnkshësha|goshesæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshesæfnkrosha|goshesæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshesæfnkmusha|goshesæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshesæfnkyasha|goshesæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:shosfafasha|shosfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shosfafshësha|shosfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shosfafrosha|shosfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shosfafmusha|shosfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shosfafyasha|shosfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshosfafnkshësha|goshosfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshosfafnkrosha|goshosfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshosfafnkmusha|goshosfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshosfafnkyasha|goshosfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
